intro: Eragrostis sarmentosa, commonly known as broom grass or Indian hay, is a type of grass that is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. This plant is rich in health benefits, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, making it a valuable natural remedy for respiratory health.
